name: streampixel-monorepo
description: SaaS Platform Foundation for Unreal Engine Pixel Streaming

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "shared,backend,frontend" -c "cyan,green,blue" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/shared" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=apps/backend && npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check --workspace=packages/shared && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/backend && npm run type-check --workspace=apps/frontend
